notes: Open-source multi-agent terminal coding agent by CodebuffAI; benchmarks against Claude Code. Name is "code" + "buff" (buffed-up / enhanced). STRESS first syllable: CODE-buff. "buff" rhymes with "stuff"/"rough" (NOT "byoof"). No creator-documented pronunciation found, but both halves are everyday English words so the reading is unambiguous. Formerly named Manicode.
